title: lellingeria schenckii
intro: Lellingeria schenckii is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the Schenck's fern or Schenck's lellingeria. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lellingeria schenckii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lellingeria schenckii are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by applying a topical solution to affected areas.
